background: Homeworld: Tewfik (SR 1820 — Low Population, Imperial border world). Close enough to the Solomani border that the Front is a daily political reality, not an abstraction. Joined the Marines because the border makes you take sides early. Commands Ibáñez-Ochoa's 30-Marine detachment aboard IMS Resolute Purpose. Has briefed her Marines for a high-value site security operation against unknown personnel, possibly armed, likely trained — minimum force, take prisoners. Does not know why. Shares Ibáñez-Ochoa's conviction this is not routine, but finds this interesting rather than uncomfortable.
education: Tewfik secondary schooling. Imperial Marines Academy. Officer candidate school.
terms: Marines (Infantry): Gun Combat (energy)-1, Athletics (endurance)-1, Recon-1, Melee (blade)-1. Basic Marine infantry. Qualified marksman. Advanced to rank 1.
Marines (Infantry): Gun Combat (energy)-2, Athletics (endurance)-2, Stealth-1, Vacc Suit-1. Advanced infantry combat. Multiple deployments. Advanced to rank 2.

Marines (Officer): Gun Combat (energy)-3, Tactics (military)-2, Leadership-2, Recon-2, Electronics (sensors)-1, Medic-1, Survival-0. Officer qualification, command of Marine detachment. Advanced to rank 3 (Lieutenant). Equipment: TL13 Combat Armour, Laser Rifle, Gauss Pistol, Combat Blade, Tactical planning tablet.
interactions: Role: Marine Commander aboard IMS Resolute Purpose. Commands 30 Marines in the KR-DELTA operation. Arrives at Kethara station 55-90 minutes after activation signal.

Marine briefing: Her Marines know minimum force and take prisoners. She has also briefed them on megafauna — 'Do not engage local fauna unless directly threatened. We are not here to shoot dinosaurs.'
Personality: Loyal to Ibáñez-Ochoa professionally. Would like to know what is actually in the Kethara basin. She is patient. She will find out eventually.

Tactical approach: If Marchetti-Solis has exact station coordinates — direct G-carrier strike, 55 minutes. If only grid reference — infantry approach from KR-7, 90 minutes. She adapts based on what she knows.
On megafauna: She has read Osei-Bonsu's survey data. She suspects her 'don't shoot dinosaurs' instruction will not survive contact with the jungle.

armour.name: TL13 Combat Armour
armour.traits: Sealed, tactical HUD with squad overlay — full 30-Marine squad comms link

equipment.name: Tactical Planning Tablet
equipment.traits: Squad overlay, terrain mapping, orbital feed from Resolute Purpose

equipment.name: 30 Marines (TL13 standard kit)
equipment.traits: Each: TL13 Combat Armour (+13), Gauss Rifle (3D, AP5, Auto 2), Gauss Pistol, Motion Sensor, Encrypted Squad Comms. 26 Marines + 3 Fire Team Leaders.

contacts.kind: Commander Ibáñez-Ochoa (Commanding Officer, IMS Resolute Purpose)
Lt. Commander Marchetti-Solis (operational authority for KR-DELTA — she will work with whoever gives her a clear threat assessment)
